steps: Downloaded and cached audio from GCS URLs (104 samples, ~10 hours)
Converted all to 16 kHz mono WAV using torchaudio.transforms
Applied duration filtering (0.5s - 30s per Whisper hard limit)
Cleaned transcripts: NFC normalization, removed zero-width chars, collapsed whitespace
Verified Devanagari dominance (>70% codepoints must be Devanagari)
Stratified train/val/test split (80/10/10) by speaker to prevent leakage
Extracted log-Mel spectrograms (80 channels, Whisper feature extractor)
Applied token-length guard (discard >448 subwords per Whisper limit)
Downloaded and cached audio from GCS URLs (104 samples, ~10 hours)
Converted all to 16 kHz mono WAV using torchaudio.transforms
Applied duration filtering (0.5s - 30s per Whisper hard limit)
Cleaned transcripts: NFC normalization, removed zero-width chars, collapsed whitespace
Verified Devanagari dominance (>70% codepoints must be Devanagari)
Stratified train/val/test split (80/10/10) by speaker to prevent leakage
Extracted log-Mel spectrograms (80 channels, Whisper feature extractor)
Applied token-length guard (discard >448 subwords per Whisper limit)

sampling.strategy: Stratified sampling from live error rows with deterministic every-Nth selection; when category coverage was sparse, repeated-category sampling was used for targeted fix evaluation.

categories.name: Phoneme Confusion
categories.description: Acoustically similar phonemes are confused in decoding.

examples.cause: Confusion between ष [ʂ] and श [ʃ] in similar acoustic environments
Aspiration loss on [ɡʰ] → [ɡ] due to coarticulatory effects
ष/स confusion in initial position with similar acoustic character
Geminate consonant doubling: ष → त्त in perceptual confusion

categories.name: English Loanword
categories.description: Loanword rendering inconsistencies in Hindi context.

categories.name: Word Boundary
categories.description: Word segmentation errors such as fusion or split tokens.

examples.cause: Word fusion across syllable boundary without pause
Incorrect word boundary detection mid-word آپ
Word fusion across syllable boundary without pause

top_fixes.approach: Use confusion-pair dictionary and context scoring for common Devanagari phoneme substitutions.
Detect Roman tokens and transliterate/tag loanwords to match submission conventions.
Apply token-merge/split rules based on Hindi lexicon and confidence-guided boundaries.

proposed_fixes.approach: Use confusion-pair dictionary and context scoring for common Devanagari phoneme substitutions.
Detect Roman tokens and transliterate/tag loanwords to match submission conventions.
Apply token-merge/split rules based on Hindi lexicon and confidence-guided boundaries.
